GeneralDescription.SourceString: No quarry can escape her... in any reality.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: No quarry can escape her... in any reality.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The dark fae huntress Shimmerdusk, a monster hunter of great renown, has tracked Kado Thorne across time and space to this Island. But she will need all her wits to secure her showdown...
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The dark fae huntress Shimmerdusk, a monster hunter of great renown, has tracked Kado Thorne across time and space to this Island. But she will need all her wits to secure her showdown...
